svg.title: Resume Tailor System Design Diagram
svg.desc: Full system design of the Resume Tailor app — architecture, API routes, and user flow — built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Zod, Anthropic Claude API, and deployed on Vercel.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Resume Tailor frontend UI')
sendPrompt('What does the main page component do in Resume Tailor?')
sendPrompt('What does the ResumeAnalyzer component do?')
sendPrompt('What does the ResultsDisplay component show?')
sendPrompt('How does Zod validation work in Resume Tailor?')
sendPrompt('How is state managed in the Resume Tailor app?')
sendPrompt('What does Tailwind CSS do in this project?')
sendPrompt('How is Resume Tailor deployed on Vercel?')
g.text: Next.js 14 App Router — Vercel edge deployment

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the /api/analyze route do in Resume Tailor?')
sendPrompt('What does the /api/tailor route do in Resume Tailor?')
sendPrompt('What does the lib layer do in Resume Tailor?')
g.text: Prompt builders · response parsers · TypeScript types · Anthropic SDK client

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Resume Tailor use the Anthropic Claude API?')
sendPrompt('How does Vercel host Resume Tailor?')
sendPrompt('What does the user input in Resume Tailor?')
sendPrompt('How does the ATS analysis work in Resume Tailor?')
sendPrompt('What does Claude return in the ATS score response?')
sendPrompt('How does the resume tailoring step work?')
sendPrompt('How does streaming work in the Resume Tailor output?')
